tasks.task_content_zh: 介紹桃源區布農族的八部合音（Pasibutbut）與音樂文化
tasks.task_content_en: Introduce the Bunun's eight-part harmony Pasibutbut and their musical culture in Taoyuan District

tasks.task_content_zh: 介紹林園石化工業區的規模與台灣石化產業鏈的重要性
tasks.task_content_en: Introduce the scale of Linyuan's petrochemical zone and its importance to Taiwan's petrochemical supply chain

tasks.task_content_zh: 介紹湖內區的龍目井與在地水資源文化
tasks.task_content_en: Introduce Lungmujing (Dragon Eye Well) and local water resource culture in Hunei District
